2025-26 Men's Basketball Roster

7 Jordan Torres

  • Height 6-7
  • Class Freshman
  • Hometown Elizabeth, NJ
  • Bio
  • Related
  • Stats

Biography

Freshman (2025-26):
Torres appeared in five games and recorded the first points of his collegiate career against Chestnut Hill on February 28.

Prior to Felician:
Graduated from Elizabeth High School in 2025. Named First Team All-County

Personal Life:
Son of Hanan and Victor Torres..
